$schema: Machine-readable feature state tracker. Source of truth for status; per-feature MD docs are source of truth for design/runtime.

policy.definition_of_done: implementation complete + verify-done passed (CLI invoked against .brain, exit codes + TOON eyeballed, stderr diagnostics-only) + feature MD updated + brain skill --check green + brain coherent

features.name: Core AXI CLI
features.description: Zero-dep Node ESM `brain` CLI that reads/writes a target .brain harness (features, progress, runs, docs, search, context, setup, skill) and emits TOON on stdout.
features.evidence: manual: `node bin/brain.js` + every subcommand run against fixture .brain, exit codes + TOON output eyeballed; `brain skill --check` green; committed in c1b0880 (first iteration).

features.name: brain review — interactive plan review surface
features.description: Localhost HTTP server + browser chrome + injected artifact SDK. Agent writes an HTML plan, opens a review session, long-polls for annotations/feedback, applies edits, loops. Plans/reviews/screenshots/verifications persist into .brain. Includes execution mode (runs append, check, ship).
features.evidence: Execution dashboard verified PASS 2026-07-16: /watch/brain-review rendered all sections (pipeline, health 8/8, step accordion, checkpoints), runs-append appeared via SSE <5s no reload, unknown slug 404 with known slugs. Review flow regression: brain check 8/8 + skill --check green.

features.name: shot-review — screenshot carousel + annotation
features.description: In-page lightbox carousel for screenshots on both review surfaces (/watch dashboard + review chrome exec sidebar) replacing one-tab-per-image, plus pin-and-note annotation on screenshots that flows back to the agent for the next review round.
features.evidence: Verification PASS 2026-07-17 (features/shot-review/verifications/2026-07-17.md): Playwright walk of /watch/shot-review — lightbox opens in-page (pages() count asserted), arrow nav + filmstrip + counter, pin annotation POST 200 visible via shots notes (open, 39.9%,69.9%), Esc close, re-capture flips to superseded; E1 server-down shows inline error with note preserved. Zero jsErrors on golden path. skill --check + brain check green.

features.name: annotation-watch — post-ship feedback runner
features.description: Blocking `brain shots poll <feature>` runner the agent starts when a feature reaches shipped/PR state: waits for new reviewer pin-annotations from the /watch carousel and returns them TOON-formatted, closing the annotate→agent loop like review poll does for plans. Dashboard CTA reflects a live watcher.

features.name: harness-mode — AGENTS.md parity (verify runner + bookend playbooks + init)
features.description: Makes brain-axi a full 5-subsystem harness: `brain verify` runs a declared check registry (.brain/verify.json, stages bootstrap/baseline/verify) replacing bespoke init.sh + verify scripts; `start`/`done` bookend playbooks; `brain init` scaffolds a minimal .brain skeleton with optional AGENTS.md pointer. setup --commands generation deferred per plan harness-parity D0.
